It is against the AppStore rules to check if the device has developer mode on as it’s a private API not to be used by 3rd party apps on the Apple AppStore.

The customer service was absolutely useless, I’ve made around 20 calls with all the staffs telling me the exact same thing about how they don’t know anything and they’ll have to transfer me. Every transfer to another department is about another 20 minute wait including the identify verification every time. I closed the account instantly after I filed a complaint with the CFPB which they finally unlocked my account. It is by far the worst banking experience I’ve ever had PLEASE NEVER OPEN AN ACCOUNT WITH THEM!!!

title: Do not, under any circumstances, open an account with Marcus…
review:
In March of 2025, I opened an account with Marcus.
After no more than a weeks time, my account was locked, and soon after that, my account was closed completely. They say it’s because I was in violation of one of their policies, and that is their right, and I will not waste time arguing the minutia of what they saw versus what actually happened, but I’m not happy with the fact that they never told me which policy was violated or how I violated the policy. I never got a warning that they were going to close or lock the account. I woke up one morning, logged onto the account, only to find the account was frozen.
As of now, they still have the money that I deposited to open the account in the first place. I’ve placed numerous calls to them, asking/demanding/complaining for my money to be returned to me and as of this writing, I still don’t have my money back. They keep insisting that my money is “perfectly safe with them”. My opinion is that the money isn’t perfectly safe with them because it’s not perfectly safe with me.
To me, this almost seems like theft. They took my money, close the account, and now they’re refusing to give my money back, or at the very least, they’re taking their own sweet time sending the money back. This is mid-May now, so we’re talking about two months or more since the account was closed. That, in my opinion, is a totally unacceptable situation. 
If this can happen to me, it could happen to you as well. Stay away from Marcus at all costs.

Maybe I should change my password to something easier, like "monkey123" so that I can actually use the app.  Security is hard, but if it doesn't work it's useless.

title: Why is this bank 4.8?
review: I recently transferred 5k to Marcus, a couple day later I had it available in my available balance to transfer, I mad a couple transfers every thing went well, got a call from the fraud department asking me questions about my activity and wanted details of my bank, I did nothing wrong and they locked my account, now there holding 5k with no logical explanation, I have taken legal counsel on this matter, I’m tired of banks bullying there customers because they have there money.

title: 🤔 What’s the purpose of Face ID?
review: This app kicks me off every 3rd day or so….I have Face ID setup…why is this happening??  I think you’re missing the purpose of an app.

title: Sadge
review: Unfortunately didn’t even get to try it. With the Plaid linking issues and having to use my password instead of Face ID, requiring a verification code every time, I’m closing the account before even trying it. Dev team has to do better.

title: Why remove the charts?
review: There is barely anything to this app now. Why?

title: Amazon Bank
review:
I have enjoyed using Marcus Goldman Sachs online banking for years. Have saved much money and highest interest rates I could find on cd’s and regular savings account. 
You will love this Bank!

title: What happened to the insights
review:
I enjoyed the app & having my money well secured. The only thing i dislike is the fact that the insights got taken away. I liked being able to link my accounts and see my net worth all at the same time, it's a shame it got taken away. It is over simplified now. For that reason it became 3 stars out of 5.
I hope you guys bring it back.

title: Technical issues
review: The Marcus app has had authentication issues for years. It’s the only banking app I’ve used that is consistently buggy like this.

title: Zelle?
review: Still lacks Zelle.

title: Cue the automated response. Bring back charts!
review: Hi there. Your feedback is valuable to us, and we appreciate you taking the time to share your thoughts. We'll forward this along to the appropriate department.

title: Why did they remove the balance chart?
review:
They use to have a simple chart showing your balance over time. It was a nice feature but they removed it for some reason a few months ago. It has negatively impacted my experience.

Otherwise it’s a solid HYSA with a clean UX and decent rate. Just doesn’t make sense to strip features away from customers.

title: Transfer & withdraw.
review:
Can you stop making wire transfers, transfers or withdraw very difficult for us. For Christ sake it’s our money we can transfer to any bank of our choice. Please make transfer to other banks or
Wire transfer easy. Thank you

title: THIS BANK IS A TOTAL SCAM
review: I transferred $13,838.67 on July 31st 2024 from my Citibank account to Marcus. After I did that transfer they locked my account. After a month of verification they unlocked my account. I decided to transfer my funds to another bank account that wasn’t Citibank cuz I already had my Citibank account closed at that time because I wasn’t earning much interest. They forced closed my account without warning on September 17th for the last several months they have been trying to transfer the funds back to Citibank but it keeps getting rejected. They decide to send a check with all my funds palpable to my closed Citibank account but it gets rejected once again. Citibank sends me a letter saying they received a check to my closed account but they are unable to make the deposit because the account is closed and sent the check back to me. I sent Marcus the letter from Citibank to show that the account is mine and that they can’t deposit the funds to that account. I sent them an identity affidavit form to proof that I am who I am and the check cuz they sent a bad check. It’s been serval months and I’m still requesting a check to be payable to me. DO NOT PUT MONEY INTO MARCUS OR ELSE YOU WILL BR ANOTHER VICTIM TO THEIR SCAMS

title: Terrible customer service
review: Signed a friend up to the referral program and only received 2 out of 3 payments. It’s been a terrible experience trying to receive the 3rd payment. Either Marcus is just blatantly lying to me at this point or just can’t figure out how to run their own referral program.

title: Can’t make an account because I don’t exist
review: First of all, I have to call in order to make an account which does NOT help my social anxiety. Secondly, after about half an hour of getting pushed through different people and having to tell them my ssn, address, etc., they tell me the information is invalid and that’s all they can say because of privacy issues. Seriously? Everything on the form was correct

title: Bad experience with closed account
review: After opening a saving account through this app my account was shortly closed due to some concerns over the phone number on the account. After months of back and forth with their “highly rated customer service” I have gotten nowhere and still haven’t gotten my money back. I’m not normally the complaining type but this has been a bit crazy to me.

title: No two factor authentication
review: I’ll take anything to keep my investments safe, I’m dumbfounded there isn’t an option for two factor authentication?  What is this, the 1990s?

title: THEY WILL STEAL YOUR MONEY
review: Don’t use this app or bank because they will lock you out and keep your money. I made a savings account with them and after a mistake where the deposit didn’t go through because my bank made a mistake they just closed the account and kept my money. I called for months and they always gave me the runaround saying in a couple days the money would return to my bank account but it never did and they never gave me my money back. Not sure if there’s a place I can report them for that so I write this review so save someone else the hassle.

title: Can’t link any external accounts
review: Tried linking my bank account using Plaid — it fails. Try to manually link my bank using acct number and routing number — bank isn’t “supported”. I can only take funds out by requesting from my checking account, and that takes even more time. Really disappointing experience. I think I’ll look elsewhere for a different bank.

title: Basic app
review: App is very basic however I have been happy with the account so far (2+ years). Their interest rates aren’t as competitive as they used to be but sometimes you can get a great short term CD rate. Good place to park savings.

title: Login Error
review: Face ID no longer works and simply says login error. Can only fix it by changing the password but then once you log out and try to log back in, same thing happens again.

title: Cannot Open Account
review: I spent over an hour on the phone with at least 5 customer service representatives who could not verify my identity. Since I couldn’t even open an account, I ended up deleting my account and taking my business elsewhere, and I suggest you do the same.

title: complaint
review: The customer service has almost no processing capacity. They do not welcome anyone except American citizens. They freeze personal accounts at will. My account has been locked for 2-3 months and has not been processed yet. Each communication with customer service lasts for up to an hour without any results. There is no complaint channel.

title: Marcus insights
review: Without Marcus insights there is not reason to login to Marcus app except for couple of times a quarter such a waste of time killing the feature

title: Traveling abroad
review: Why is it that I can’t view my account while abroad? A vpn doesn’t work either. If I ever needed to transfer cash I would be stranded. Horrible policy. Will be switching savings accounts when back in the states and will never recommend to anyone that travels.

title: It used to be good.
review: It used to be good for checking all accounts. But now you can only see Info for Marcus accounts.

title: Can’t link an external account through plaid or manually
review: Plaid was successful in connecting but then an error message within marcus still said the account linking has failed, and gave me the option to try manual linking. This takes me to a webview or safari view controller, and the experience is disgustingly annoying. Can’t paste in my accounting or routing numbers. When i switch between apps to copy the numbers, the entire web view refreshes back to the Link accounts page. Really difficult experience

title: Frustrating Transfer Issues : Why can’t I send funds to my desired external account?
review: I had a frustrating app experience trying to transfer money from my Savings to an external account. For months, I kept receiving the error message "Unable to process your request at this time!" When I reached out to Marcus via the mobile app chat, they informed me that I hadn’t completed another verification step and that I would need to call customer care. After calling, the agent told me that I couldn't transfer funds to a new external account because the bank doesn't allow it. However, I could transfer it back to the original external account. Why is the bank restricting me from transferring money to any account I choose? Very disappointing 😞

title: Marcus has fallen way off
review: A few years ago Marcus used to be one of the best high yield savings accounts out there with some of the most competitive interest rates. Now their rates are not competitive with the other leaders in the industry. Referral bonuses have been cut down as well. And they block linking to competitors to transfer your money out (for example, they won’t let you link to Wealthfront at all). I would no longer recommend this institution when there are better options out there.

title: Scammers
review: I opened online saving account closed after 4 months without notice and money disappeared , i'm not the 1st victim find out that they have did this with many other customers and customer service agents are scammers

title: External account tracking GONE
review: I LOVED being able to view my other banking accounts and credit cards and the categories of my expenses. This used to be my ONLY source of tracking my expenditure categories across all my accounts. And now with the update it’s completely gone. (For banks claiming they want us to budget and know where our money is going… they sure do love taking away the free options for easily doing so.) I know historically this used to be Clarity Money (a free, award-winning app) and Sachs bought it out. But now they’ve just erased all of the tracking functions and charts that made it was it was… and just made it a regular Sachs banking app. Not only have I deleted this app, I will actively discourage anyone from banking here, this is disgusting behavior that actively restricts economic empowerment and public access to financial tools. If you don’t want the costs of supporting an existing public resource, DON’T BUY IT OUT.

title: Don’t use
review: Horrible. Nothing else I need to say. Trash app. Find another.

title: No external transfers…
review: There is no way to transfer your money out of the bank on this app…very convenient for the bank and inconvenient for the consumer

title: App is great but
review: App is great but could definitely use more control of my account within the app. I can cancel a transfer but wish I could edit it. Every time I make a chance to a transfer it triggers a confirmation letter in the mail. Would be great if I could edit or pause a transfer without having to start a new one.

title: Amazing and simple
review: The app is great I just wish it had widget. I would love to view my accounts without having to open the app everytime to view them.

title: Removed Insights - Lost Customer
review: I used to love Marcus.  Insights was the best feature.  They removed it this past May, so I will be switching to SoFi.

title: DO NOT bank with them
review: They are probably the worst bank to put your money at - banking with them for a while, at the time I want to initiate a withdrawal, they keep blocking my request. Finally got it out and I will never bank with them EVER again.

title: Dwindling functionality
review: I am closing my account and starting a new HYSA with another bank because of the severely reduced functionality within the app and the decreasing APY. With the way the app currently is, I may as well get paid more for my money for the same amount of features elsewhere.

title: When you need your money most you won’t have it.
review: Terrible, when I needed my money the most I couldn’t receive till a week later.

title: Important Feature Removed Without Warning
review:
I’ve been using the Marcus app to track my accounts and spending in one place, and it was working well, until they suddenly removed the Marcus Insights feature. There was no prior notice or communication about this, which left me confused when I couldn’t access the feature anymore.

When I contacted customer service, they weren’t even aware of the feature at first. The response I got was polite but didn’t offer much in the way of explanation or alternatives. It’s disappointing that such a key feature was taken away without any heads-up.

I expected better communication from a company like Marcus. Removing features without notice isn’t something I would expect from a company of this size. Definitely reconsidering my use of the app.

title: Couldn’t get my money for a house closing!
review:
I had been a Marcus customer since September 2022 but recently closed my account due to a frustrating experience that left me unable to access my own money when I needed it most. After initiating the transfer for the P&S, I received an alarming call instructing me to contact Marcus. The first agent I spoke with had no idea why I was called, and I was transferred SEVEN times, each time having to re-authenticate with three pieces of information. The agents repeatedly cited ‘quick money rules,’ despite the fact that I had more than five times the necessary amount in my account for over two years, and a significant deposit had been made four months prior.

Eventually, one agent was able to assist, but even she couldn’t assure me that I would be able to wire the funds for my closing. Given this uncertainty, I transferred my entire balance to another bank, which could issue a certified check. This process, however, was equally painful—I spoke with 11 different representatives before finally being able to move my money.

While I valued the high interest rates and ease of use with Marcus, what’s the point of a high-yield savings account if you can’t access your funds when you need them most? This experience ultimately led me to close my account.

title: FACE ID ALWAYS FAILED
review: Doesn’t matter if your app is outdated the issue with the Face ID is always a problem you have to sign in all the time plus you can’t do ever on it, just basic things

title: Old interface was better
review: Love this app but no idea why they changed the design. The old design was comprehensive and easier to navigate. Go back please!

title: TERRIBLE APP
review: App is not as functional or informative as apps for other banks.

title: Terrible bank
review: Do not open a “Marcus” by Goldman Sachs banking account, they’ve recently forced closed my account for some type of activity “for suspicious reason” and can’t disclose save yourself the trouble and heart break by not opening a Marcus account at all.

title: ┬─┬ノ( º _ ºノ)
review: impossible to link external accounts using the app

title: Needs a dark mode app
review: Please update the dark mode app!!!

title: Great app, but devs seemingly ignoring customer feedback
review: I’ve had no issues withdrawing money as many of the recent reviews here seem to flag, perhaps that only triggers issues when one tries to draw large amounts. The deprecation of the graphs were a net loss to the quality of the app, as they made financial growth feel more tangible due to the visual element. There are countless cries here from users who wish to have it back, and many of the responses from the dev team (or whatever it is that responds to these reviews, perhaps it’s ChatGPT) are incredibly generic. If you’re not going to reinstate the graphs just say so and don’t give us false hope. For future notice please consult your users before making anymore changes that degrade the quality of the app. Inform us beforehand if you’re going to rip away a beloved feature- bad customer relations right there. Product manager needs a spanking!

title: Worst bank to deal with
review:
I initiated transaction from Marcus to my another bank account. I received multiple calls to confirm and authorized these transactions. Two days later they freezed the account and canceled the transactions without my knowledge. Spent so many hours with the customer service but didn’t received any resolution whatsoever.

I finally decided to close my account with Marcus. Such a relief.

title: Bad set up
review: Unable to download new app. Cant seem to find button to download.

title: Great app that Finally totals assets
review: Five stars! Thanks for updating the app to show the total assets at the top

title: BRING BACK THE INSIGHTS
review: the best part were the insights where i can see my net worth across all checking, savings, credit, and debit. it was awesome having everything divided into different categories so i know how much i spent on each category per year. please bring it back before i transfer to a different hysa…

title: Locked from Account and no way to Verify
review:
On August 16, I called because my account was locked. They asked for my phone number and told me to wait until August 20. I called again on August 20, and they asked for my phone number and my wife's phone number. They also asked for our driver's licenses, and when they realized the licenses were from California, they couldn’t verify them. I was told to wait 3-4 business days.

When I called on August 23, I was informed that the representatives couldn’t send the one-time password because neither my wife’s nor my phone number was secure enough. They also asked for my license again. I was told that I would need to visit a notary to verify my identity and that I should wait 4-7 business days for the document to be sent.

I called back on August 30, and they started asking for my phone number and license again. I told them that neither was working and that I was calling to confirm that the document was being sent. They ignored me and insisted I provide my phone number again, only to find out it was still not secure. They said I would receive the document to bring to the notary within 7-10 business days from that day. When I spoke to Supervisor Bobby, he told me that the previous 4-7 day estimate was incorrect.

DO NOT USE MARCUS TERRIBLE CUSTOMER SERVICE! I CASE IS NOT THE ONLY CASE OF INDIVIDUALS GETTING PERMANENTLY LOCKED FROM ACCOUNT.

title: This bank is a literal SCAM
review: TLDR: My experience with Marcus savings has truly been the epitome of shady, incompetent online banking. I'm not someone to write bad reviews, but this has been such a frustrating and ridiculous situation, and I want to warn everyone, please, DO NOT trust this bank. It's one thing if an account is closed and customer service isn't able to provide an explanation behind this, but shouldn't getting the funds back be made an absolute priority? I'm not sure why this bank has deliberately made this become such a complicated and stressful process, where even after 4 YEARS they still have refused to give my money back. I had an account opened with Marcus back in 2020, which suddenly got closed a few months later. When I tried calling customer service, they refused to give me any explanation behind the account's closure. After several attempts to call them regarding getting the money back into my original bank account, I still never received my funds. In July, I had a family emergency that required me to travel for a few weeks - prior to leaving, I desperately tried to call back to see if my money could be sent back to me before I left. They said that a check would be mailed to me within 14 business days and to my surprise, there was no check in the mail once I got back. Again, I tried to call them regarding this, and they stated that their so-called 'review team' would be reopening my account within 30 business days instead. I called again today (which is when I should have received an update regarding the reopening of my account) and yet again, still there is no update regarding if or when I'll be able to get my money back. Endless attempts to speak with both customer service and specialists have been failures, as they are entirely clueless about any updates from the 'review team', and now I haven't been given any timeframe as to when I'll be receiving an update at all. It's rather repulsing to see that a bank with such a good reputation and reviews, being "rated #1 in customer service" can be this negligent and incapable of addressing basic matters.

title: Ok for deposits, bad for GM card
review: I have an online savings account and two CDs with Marcus, and the app is fine for both. My GM credit card was switched from Capital One to Marcus though, and the app is HORRIBLE for credit cards. It lacks even the most basic features like the ability to set up payment reminder alerts. I have never seen such a barebones app for a credit card. I barely use the card anymore because I worry about late payments, maybe one charge every couple months to keep it active after 30 YEARS as an account holder. Sure enough I was a day late on my most recent payment and now have a ridiculous $0.29 finance charge to pay. I will not use the card again and may move my assets elsewhere.

title: Where’s the graphing chart of all the months?
review: I liked looking at the graph charts oh how much I have in each month add that back

title: Don’t bank here!
review:
Opened a CD and deposited a 6 digit amount. After the money arrived the account was locked. 
Phone hotline said they can’t share why but are closing due to suspected fraud. That’s just insane. 
I have no way to withdraw my money and am waiting now for up to 10 business days how I get my money back. This is ridiculous.

 DO NOT BANK HERE!

title: Decent App - Bring Back Charts!
review: Decent app does its job. One of the recent updates remove the ability to view your accounts as charts over time. That was a great feature - would love to have it back.

title: Only fair
review: As a GM Rewards client the forced switch to Marcus felt like a major step down from Capital One in terms of app and website. So much wasted space on splash screen. Major gripe is can only get notifications of purchases and stuff by email. No text option. Someone could make make purchases on my card and I wouldn’t know until I check email which could be hours later. Need text option! Should be a logout button on most pages. Often have to hunt for a page where can logout. Lettering on card itself very hard to read. Sorry to be so negative but disappointed after years with Capital One. Chat rep ended my chat after I asked a question (09/20/23)

title: Lost good features with the updates
review: Please bring back the graph and the sum total of accounts on the home page!

title: Latest version broke my ability to view my account
review: This latest update broke my ability to view my account. When I try to go into my online savings account, I now get the error message “We couldn’t load your account details. Try again”. I’ve tried removing the app and its data and reinstalling. Nothing works. Accessing my account via web browser still works thankfully. I’ve tried chatting with their support who were not helpful. Hopefully they passed along my issue to the dev team. Posting a review here just in case. Otherwise the app has always been great.  UPDATE- This issued was fixed in a subsequent update.  Thanks!!

title: No balance total anymore?
review: Still waiting for them to add back basic functionality.   Thanks for forcing me to update to the new app. Now I need a calculator to figure out how much money I have total in all my CDs. Who thought it was a good idea to get rid of the total balance?

title: DO NOT BANK WITH MARCUS
review: While the app was ok, the customer service was horrible. My account was frozen because they couldn’t tie my AT&T phone to my home address. They tied up my money for two months. They rejected my affidavit of identity saying that the notary cannot be remote and has to use a raised seal —- by the way not requirements in either NY or Utah where they are located. They hang up on you and give you contrary information. Marcus Goldman must be rolling over in his grave.

title: You cost me 500 dollars
review: I get it at the beginning of this it was my fault I was wanting to transfer 500 for Marcus to my bank for checking I selected the wrong accounts, but they still took the money even though there was no were near that amount to take witch put me in the negative so I chatted and called Marcus to see if anyone could help and I basically got told to move more money over to balance it out or pay 50 dollars for a wire transfer that still would take the normal amount of time it would take for a transfer so I got rob for 500 dollars that I am left having to pay it back when all I wanted was my money that I saved so I lost a client and 500 dollars by clicking the wrong button thanks Marcus

title: Took my money and won’t give it back
review: I opened an account with Marcus and transferred my funds into it. While transferring, they didn’t have a problem. As soon as I tried to take my money out, they put my account on a hold. Now they are not responding, telling me they’ll call back but never doing so, and putting me on indefinite holds when I call their customer service. I have never had such a terrible experience with any bank. There’s not even any channel for me to file a complaint.

title: Please reinstate the monthly graph
review: The monthly graph and sleek user interface was what convinced me to open an account with Marcus. However, the latest update has overhauled that design. Please consider reverting to the previous version or giving users an option to view the monthly graph and visually track the changes in our account balances.

title: Very difficult to take the money out, useless customer service
review: They put ridiculous and unnecessary amount of barrier to make it as difficult as possible for you to take your money out (17 steps of three party verification etc. they might as well just come draw my blood for DNA testing). Basically you’re screwed if you need some cash for emergency. The customer service agents (yes, plural) were useless and incompetent. All they did was repeating the exact same response over and over as if they were sitting at a congressional hearing. Would’ve given zero star if I could.

title: Hide Account Balances
review:
I like this app thus far, I’d love to to see an update where you can hide your account balance upon logging in. 

- Thank you!

title: Miss old user interface
review: The new design is lacking a lot. I miss the precious design of the app as it showed a lot more information.

title: No summary of accounts
review: Why did you get rid of this feature? It is beyond silly.

title: Don't use this bank any way because when you need your money you won’t be able to.
review: Don't use this bank any way because when you need your money you won't be able to. It's been about 2 years since we opened our Marcus account but today it's been 4 days since I've been trying to take some of my money there because I need it and they just blocked my money in their hands, I've called more than 20 times and always the same thing they can't tell me what happened I have to wait until they call me something that hasn't happened so far. I try to close the account, it's the same thing, they just don't want my money back to me. Now I will have to look for a lawyer so that I can redeem my money. Crazy bank

title: No longer what it used to be
review: This app was my go-to when it came to reviewing my monthly transactions from all of my external accounts. It’s no longer what it was and has rebranded all the way. It used to provide what all was spent and allocate the transactions into different categories (ex: Pets, Home, Food, Shopping). I wish they would recreate a separate app with that purpose if they’re no longer supporting that type of platform. It was the best!! Sad to see it go… maybe another bank can duplicate it. *shrug*

title: Total balance removal was a downgrade
review:
The app has been updating with downgrades on each version.
1. Being able to view the total balance in summary was a useful information which was removed now making it harder to track the total.

2. When selecting an account and then adding funds it asks for the account selection again from the drop down.

Would love to give 5 star if at-least the first issue is resolved.

title: Bring back the graph
review: I want to make sure each month my growth is steady but the graph was removed, it was my fav feature of the app

title: Widget Please
review: It’s 2024. The app itself is trying to seem minimalistic which is great and all, but I’d love to see the app have an apple widget just displaying the funds on the screen rather than me having to sign in repeatedly.

title: Used to be great
review: Marcus has made a lot of changes to the app and its interface in the past couple of months. Taking away the insights aspect of the home page was brutal and I found that it greatly diminished the helpfulness of the app, enough that I considered switching to another bank that offered a more robust app interface. I really didn’t think the app could get worse after they did that. However, one of the more recent updates took away the ability to see the sum of your accounts at the top of the home page. Now if I want to know what I have in total savings across my accounts, I have to do the math myself, and that’s just ridiculous for a banking app. Almost nothing about this app is helpful or user friendly anymore. If you’re new to the app, you probably won’t have many complaints but I doubt that anyone that had the old Marcus app is happy with the current one.

title: Worst Customer Experience I’ve had anywhere
review:
Do your online banking anywhere but here. There are different high yield savings accounts with far better customer service and verification methods. My account has been locked for 6 months and I have no way to access my money or make any transfers or withdrawals. I’ve been on five different 30+ minute phone calls over the course of those months trying to get my account unlocked, but because I don’t live in one of a certain few states, they can’t use anything but my phone number to verify me on my account (not even my SSN, Drivers License Number, or secret word). Even though I put my own phone number on the account, there’s an issue with the Caller ID that the carrier can’t fix so I have no way of accessing my account. 

CHOOSE A DIFFERENT ONLINE BANK! Marcus is not worth the headache.   

If you want your money locked up with no way to access it, you’re in the right place!

title: Good app but
review: Like the app, but there was a recent update that took away the graph to see your amount. Bring back the graph!!

title: Scam
review:
I opened an account with help from their customer support. On July 3 they very efficiently accepted the transfer of $5,000 from my bank.

By the next day they unilaterally closed the account because of whatever reason. It is such a kafkaesque process they don’t give you a reason other than they have the right to do so.

They were supposed to return my money in 10 work days. 

Instead use Bank of America (BoA) + Merrill Lynch Edge (ML) or Wealthfront. I’ve been using BoA for 15 years and they are solid. ML is associated with BoA and I find their Edge app better in terms of convenience (instead of sms I can unlock with my face). Wealthfront has also been solid thus far. 

Neither of the competitors mentioned above have done the shenanigans Marcus did.

Avoid Marcus and Goldman like the plague.

title: Account Summary
review: Bring back the summary report of all accounts. I have multiple accounts and want to be able to quickly see what my total savings are across all accounts.

title: New user interface hurts user experience
review: The new app update eliminates the sleek design and month over month trends. Really reduces the user experience

title: iOS 16 or later
review: I loved the APP while I was able to use it but since it requires iOS 16.0 or later can no longer get it! 🫤

title: Why would you axe the only unique qualifier of your product?
review: I cannot believe I am writing a one-star review for the Marcus app. To start, I have enjoyed my experience having a high yield savings account with Marcus. Until recently, you could also link your external banking partner accounts to Marcus to view your overall net worth, transaction history, and spending data. As of May 22, that feature has now been removed, reducing the Marcus app to another failure in a long line of banking apps. Hence this one-star review, for the interface of the Marcus app, not at all to do with the banking products. How disappointing that you had something unique and exciting, and chose to stifle its growth.

title: Please bring back the bar graph
review: Please bring back the month-to-month bar graph.

title: Used to be Great, not so much anymore
review:
When I first started using this app, it allowed you to check your net worth by connecting all of your accounts to Marcus. That feature was removed and the app became much simpler and not really that insightful.

I still kept my money in there because the Marcus preferred the program gave you an extra 1% APY (5.4% total!) on your savings account for three months per person that you referred. But now as of July 2024, they have completely changed the program and are offering a much less competitive rate/program.

I don’t see a reason to keep my money in here other than maybe to open a CD account.

title: Latest update eliminated ability to see total sum of $ in accounts
review: This was my favorite feature. I also liked the info on how much I’d earned in interest. Please bring it back. Hard to sum up our savings now (if we have several different accounts plus CDs). Otherwise great app.

title: new app looks so bleh
review: The old interface was so much better and way more intuitive to use. It’s so boring looking now.

title: Smooth and functional... perhaps too smooth and functional
review: Works like a charm. However, the most recent update took away the bar graph that shows you how much your savings have grown over time. A small touch, perhaps, but it was a great motivator and helped me visually track if I was able to meet my savings goal each month and balance my deposits and withdrawals.

title: Went too simplistic with redesign
review:
Account wise, it’s good. Rates are competitive. Can transfer money to and from accounts with ease, at least for me. 

As for the redesign, I see what they were trying to do with making it more accessible and streamline but went little bit too far, IMO. 

The graph that shows the balance of each month was removed. I enjoyed seeing the progression I’ve made each month by growing my account and how far I’ve came along. The small financial articles were removed as well. I actually read them from time to time and gave me a better understanding of how money works. 

The redesign is not the best but still good.

title: New update
review: Can’t use the app now due to it being forced to use iOS 16.

title: Doesnt support ios 15 anymore
review: Doesnt support ios 15

title: Service
review: I can no longer withdraw money from my account. They locked it for some reason. As soon as it is unlocked I am moving my money to Sofi for better rates and customer service .

title: New UI is poor
review: It's unfortunate that the new app is poorly designed. I hate that they took away bar graph.

title: Lame reason for 1 star
review: Honestly they just had an update on the app which got rid of the graph that you could visibly see your savings grow. I took a lot of joy in seeing my yearly progress on that stupid bar graph but it makes me want to switch companies cause it’s such a disappointment. Like the title says lame reason for one star but it really ruined it for me

title: New interface review
review: I liked the previous version more because it looked more professional and exciting for me. I don’t like the new interface with so many colors and bigger numbers. This is a “fun” interface maybe for other things but for finance I preferred the previous one

title: Disappointed
review: So disappointed to see Marcus Insights removed for “simplicity”. There’s no reason to use the app anymore, and it used to be my favorite tool across financial planning apps to see my total balances and spending breakouts. What a shame.

title: New UI
review: The new design is disappointing. It was supposedly meant to ‘simplify’ the customer experience, but instead, it feels lifeless and unappealing. The app looks cheaper and the new design feels outdated compared to the previous one.

title: Horrible Customer Experience and Glitches
review: They locked my account and despite proving identity did not allow me to transfer funds. App has glitches that prevent access to alerts as well. Customer service is friendly but not helpful. I don’t recommend this savings account.

title: DUE DATE MISSING
review: Show the due dates on the home page of the accounts please.

title: Interface update was bad
review: The UI for this app recently changed and while it may have become cleaner, it feels like it’s more complicated to try and find things. I used to be able to easily see a graph of what projected interest would look like and adjusting reoccurring transfers was way easier before. Please change it back

title: New Update
review: I miss the view of the total of all accounts at the top of the application along with the daily quotes! It was a nice personable/ welcoming touch. It was simple, but very impactful. Not a fan of the update that removed them.

title: New updates are BAD
review: The updates made this app so much worse! I loved the graphs that helped me track how my account was growing over time but now they’re gone. And you can’t see the total between all your accounts anymore if you have CDs. There are issues with the app—like a lack of dark mode—that could have been improved, but instead they made it worse.

title: Update made the home page less convenient
review: I didn’t have many problems with this app until the latest update. Now the homepage no longer shows the total amount I have held in Marcus — only the totals for individual savings accounts, CDs, etc. That means I need to pull out a calculator to keep track of the total amount, which feels absurd to me when it could so easily be displayed on the app. I would also appreciate a dark mode. Otherwise, it’s a fine & functional app and I’m happy with having a Marcus account overall. Just always particularly irksome when an update makes an app worse instead of better.

title: Best features of the app removed
review: The decision to remove Marcus Insights (spending graphs, etc) was a terrible decision that went against users. They removed one of their only competing features and now the app has less financial tools to track spending compared to the competition. The app redesign resulted in a negative user experience and the support team was not willing to help with rectifying this change.

title: Love Marcus, don’t like the update
review:
I've been using the Marcus app for a while now, and overall, I've been very pleased with it. One of the standout features is the ease with which you can check your accounts. The user interface is intuitive and straightforward, making it simple to navigate through various account details.

However, with the latest update, I’ve encountered an issue that has been quite frustrating. The app no longer provides the previous option where it would show the overall account balance from all accounts at a glance. This feature was incredibly convenient for getting a quick snapshot of my total financial status without having to manually sum up individual account balances.

While I still appreciate many aspects of the app, the removal of this feature has been a significant drawback for me. I hope the developers consider bringing back the overall account balance view in future updates.

title: Love my Marcus account!
review: The app is so easy to navigate and makes transferring money seamless and fast.

title: Bring back the graph
review: Bring back the graph showing progress over time. It makes it much easier to track progress over time. Justice for graph!

title: Login for desktop doesn’t work on mobile
review: This seems to be a problem that has been persisting for a few months. My login to my Marcus account on desktop works fine, but the same login for my mobile app doesn’t work and fires a “Something went wrong” error. Super annoying, and I’m surprised they haven’t fixed this bug yet given that it’s been a few months already. Has anyone else been experiencing this too? Very frustrating. Otherwise I would have given the app 5 stars.

title: Update? More like downgrade
review:
I used to love the look and feel of this app. Marcus claims that the recent changes are what customers wanted but by reading all the other reviews, I hope they realize the err in judgement (no one seems to like this “upgrade”). 
My main motivation for putting money in my savings each month was to watch the bar graph go up. Without this feature, they’ve taken the “fun” out of having money in this account.

title: Login issues
review: Since the latest update, cannot login via app. Able to log in on browser but not app

title: BRING BACK THE GRAPH!
review: The graph was the whole reason I used the app.

title: Great bank, IOS app broken
review: I had a jailbroken device back in 2018 (2024 currently) and it seems that this app is one of the very select few that has identified my appleid to be jailbroken in the past and does not allow me to open the app. I am using a new device that was never altered (iPhone 14) and I cannot open the app to the log in screen.

title: Screwed up last update
review:
The last update screwed up everything.
You can no longer see the total amount of money you have with them.

All of your account balances are listed individually.
But they took away the cumulative balance of all my accounts.

I now have to get an adding machine to find out my cumulative balance.

Who is the person responsible for such a screw up?

title: New update took everything I liked away
review: Before the update I’d use this app all of the time to see all of my different accounts that I linked (Marcus insights). The update took it all away.

title: Where is the graph?
review: Recent update took away the bar graph where you could previously track growth over the time you had your card. This graph was what I enjoyed the most about the application and the main reason I chose Marcus over other banks with comparable rates.

title: Miss the old UI! Please bring back the old UI!
review: Updated my Marcus app to the new interface and realized with a jolt how much I loved seeing the bar chart showing my balance and progress over time! Please bring that back!!!!!!!!

title: Bring Back Account(s) Total
review: Please Bring Back the Account(s) Total at the Top…I MISS IT! 🙏🏻🙏🏻🙏🏻

title: Decent but Needs Dark Mode
review: It’s a decent app but won’t wow you. The numbers are very small and hard to read in a lot of the account views. There’s not enough contrast in colors throughout the app. Almost a white out in many areas. It needs an in-app dark mode setting!

title: Got rid of Insights
review: They got rid of the best part of the app. The app functionality didn’t need to “be streamlined” the apps now essentially your account balance and that’s it, goodbye to the very helpful analytics about your account growth and spending habits

title: New update is supposedly more streamlined…
review: but it’s not. Why do I have to manually go in to each account and then scroll down to see how my accounts are growing and calculate it on my own? Terrible UX update. Bring the older dashboard back.

title: New UI is worse
review: I love the app and a month ago I would have given it 5 stars. However the new UI is worse so I am only rating it 3 stars. Please go back to the previous UI in the app. The new UI is awful and so hard to read when viewing my account. The font colors are too light on the white background. Does it even meet ADA color contrast requirements? It’s a bad UI design and I’m shocked it was approved and released. The previous UI was much easier to use, in regards to the colors used.

title: 5 stars but no more
review:
They’ve been less and less features and that’s unbelievable why Marcus do that. They exclude the feature that shows all of your bank accounts, your network, the chart, etc. 
I hope they will add more features instead of reducing them in the future

title: Cannot Login via App
review: Using the same credentials, works on web portal but keep failing to login in the app

title: Bad product management/UI/UX
review: Dear Goldman/Marcus iOS team— I cannot log in. I cannot find what I want. I cannot autocomplete an email address. Please stop threatening me with how many login attempts I have left. I am so tired of crappy user experiences!

title: Don’t use it for down payment
review: Unlike other banks, Marcus has requirements for sending wire transfer out. I was trying to make a down payment to my title company and Marcus told me “you’re not qualified for wire transferring” and stated “due to company policy we can’t tell you why”. I used it bc it’s high yield and backed by Goldman, but now I know it’s such a sketchy app

title: Older UX/UI was better
review: Got rid of some great features of the app like overall balance, tracking account growth MoM. Good news is you can now wire transfer from mobile more easily

title: I pretty much only stuck with Marcus for the Insights
review: Now that they remove finance tracking this bank just isn’t competitive anymore. You can find higher rates elsewhere, better service, & faster transactions. I really want to know from a business perspective what were the pros & cons of ending a feature that only had upsides.

title: Personal finances and  net worth features removed
review: Completely destroyed the app by removing the overall net worth view and visibility to external linked account. This was such a helpful feature and by reading many reviews I am not the only one was us extremely disappointed by this being removed. In addition this was never communicated to users which isn’t customer centric at all.

title: Marcus Insights Removed
review: 1/5 stars for removing Marcus Insights. Very disappointing.

title: Bring back the graph
review: I miss having the graph showing how my account balance is growing. It seems to have been removed in the last update.

title: Nice update
review:
The new update strips out the frills and is a cleaner view and also makes managing various account you might have with Marcus (ie savings CDs credit cards etc.) much easier and more streamlined.

I will say I miss the graphic visuals to see the growth in your accounts overtime but overall I like the new look and more importantly the rates on offer are competitive

title: App is poorly designed. Does not allow faceid. Does not retain credentials.
review:
These design issues mean I’m constantly resetting passwords. Locking the account. And it hampers access and wastes my time.
I’m thinking about cancelling the card due to the wasted time messing with the app every month
No other vendor has this issue.
When using the app, the most necessary thing, access to the statements, is hidden. It’s something that should clearly be displayed on login.
Very unprofessional UI, its an embarassment.

title: New App Design Is Terrible
review: They got rid of Marcus Insights which was an incredible feature to visualize your accounts growth, track expenses through external accounts/credit cards, and much more. The new update is too simple and bland. If Marcus Insights is not brought back or if we are not offered similar account tracking features I will be closing mine and my wife’s accounts with the company (after 5+ years of previously happy customers), which I know a lot of other people are doing the same for this very reason. There was once a time I referred numerous friends and family to this app/banking system but now I am disappointed to use it myself.

title: Cannot see my account anymore
review: With the latest update my Marcus credit line account has disappeared and I’m unable to access it through the app. So this app is now useless unless it’s fixed I have to use the website.

title: Show total amount
review: There needs to be a total/combined amount in all accounts shown at the top. Need a savings goal in each account. Where you can set an amount goal and be able to keep track as you deposit.

title: Bring back the graph!!
review: It was really nice seeing our money grow over time in a big graph at the top of our opening page. But now that they’ve updated, not only the graph gone, but there’s actually absolutely no way for you to see it anywhere! Talk about a downer.

title: Not working
review: Everytime I log in, I get a error.  Have to rest my password every time.

title: Removed Features
review: It’s fairly simple overall, which I liked, but this latest release they’ve stripped it down to just a placeholder for money with an okay rate. There are no insights, even just into how your money has grown. In 2024 with all the data so easily available, it seems like a huge step backward to remove insight into growth even just within the account. I’ll be looking elsewhere.

title: Updated Review
review:
My initial review was that it just needed a dark mode option and that i loved the app. I had given it 5 Stars

Today, im giving it 1 star and deleted the app as its no longer useful. It’s garbage. With the REMOVAL of the total accounts, insights, expenses, cashflow, assets, the ins and out made it go from GREATNESS to TRASH.

Stop saying you value your customers when you dont.

title: Trouble logging into app
review: The app automatically logged me out one day and won’t let me log back in even though I’m able to log in on my laptop with same credentials

title: What happened to this app?
review: I never write reviews. Use to love this app. Was able to link almost all of my other accounts and track all finances easily. Not sure what this update was but cannot link any accounts now and have tried for weeks. Layout is much worse and overall just not it anymore.

title: Bring back the graph!
review: Seeing the growth on the graph was so motivating for me to save money. It was so nice how this was automated in the app. Please please please bring back!

title: What happened to the total?
review: The update removed the total of all accounts at the top of your home page. Now I have to add up all my accounts to know what I have in the bank.

title: Add back account totals!
review: Please. Add  back account totals

title: Key Features Missing on Homepage
review: Don’t understand why the new app removed total account totals and charts from the home page. Those are critical pieces of information when you have multiple types of accounts

title: Not what it used to be
review:
This used to be a phenomenal app until they recently removed a feature called “Marcus insights” (As of 5/22/2024). This feature allowed you to track your expenses from external accounts and provided very helpful tools for managing your finances. With the feature now removed, this app provides no value to your banking experience other than its high interest rate. 

This app literally provides no other features other than to view your savings account and make transfers. I would recommend another banking app with a high interest rate that also provides helpful finance tools.

title: Amazing HYSA
review:
I love Marcus! They’re one of my favorite financial institutions that is virtual. I don’t have a need to call them often as everything is self explanatory. They literally just updated their app so it’s more streamlined. It’s very fast to log on and access my information. (Some apps take a while to load but not this one). 

However, with the new update, it no longer states the total in all of your accounts at the top. Which I don’t like that. I want to see how much my total savings is. I hope they put it back. Also, my second favorite is with capital one. I wish Marcus would show an accrural amount up to date each month like capital one does. I like watching my interests grow daily until the payout. It’s not a dealbreaker but would be a nice feature.

title: Bring back functionality
review:
Removed all the best features. It’s regressed to being the least innovative and boring. 
Single reason to keep is the interest rate. Delete once it’s lower.

title: WHY CHANGE IT
review: Why did the app change from being perfect for banking, into a low effort system. The tracking, and viewing of the transactions has been taken away and tarnished. The “new” is definitely not asked for or needed. If possible, provide the option for individuals to chose to keep the old interface or the new. I guarantee your consumers will choose new. I plan on pulling ALL of my money out at MY earliest convenience. As the update can at my inconvenience.

title: New version a step backwards
review: The new version seems to have eliminated two very nice features: A display of all account totals and the graphical display of account balances. Generally, the app is very easy to use, but the elimination of these two conveniences is puzzling.

title: updated and removed functionality
review: They just updated the app and removed core functionality that was part of Marcus Insights.

title: Update Fail - removed every good thing about app
review:
Developer:  “Marcus remains committed to providing value to all of our customers…”

Customer:  Are you? 

Developer: “The removal of Marcus Insights is part of ongoing effort to simplify the customer experience and focus on products and features that mean the most to our customers.”

Customer: by removing THE very features that meant the most to your customers??

title: Update ruined what made this app great.
review:
I think I’m speaking for a lot of people when I say that one of the main reasons I use Marcus is because of the app and how beautiful it was to use it. 

The change is too simple. Yes there’s better high-yield rates out there. But I’m not concerned about chasing “the next best thing.” Quite frankly I didn’t have to. The app and the insights were what I really loved and I’ve been happy with it since signing up. 

I understand making things more simple or providing more info with less. This is just too much. The graph was awesome to see how far you’ve come and it motivates me to continue saving more when I can visualize the numbers and not have to just see the number. 

I don’t leave reviews often, but myself and many other will be disappointed & dissatisfied if the graphs and insights aren’t brought back at higher level than it was before.

title: Update is dated and a step backward
review:
This app update is less user friendly and enjoyable to review. 

Please turn it back and never change the appearance again.

title: Bring back the old features
review: The new update is awful. Why did you get rid of all of the great features that made this app so good?? I had all of me external accounts linked through Marcus and it was so helpful to be able to see everything in one place. Somehow the new "simpler" interface has made it harder to navigate. Please bring back the old interface and old features.

title: Terrible update
review: This app went down hill out of nowhere and with 0 notice. Completely changed the UI removing a large number of features. Taking my money elsewhere

title: I used too LOVE this app!
review:
Why did you get rid of your budget tracker?!?!
It was by far the most accurate money tracker I have used and you decided to get rid of it. I’m disappointed.

title: Disappointing Redesign (v2.0)
review: Like many others I prefer the layout and feature set of the old design. No option to toggle back to the prior layout and no available dark mode. The app has slid from feeling unique to basic.

title: Latest updated is a major downgrade
review:
Looks like they went from a native UI to just rendering web pages. That was a trend 10 years ago, which had failed. The new update is awful on iOS. Very slow, tiny fonts, constant shifting of layouts each time you click on something.  
Great that you all save money by not having to maintain a native app, but I’m going to take my money elsewhere now. Capital One and Etrade offer the same rates, but with a native app. What a letdown Goldman Sachs.

title: What’s going on with the world
review: No real reason to use this app anymore since the updates

title: Insights Gone???
review: This app recently updated and without the bar graph chart and insights, which honestly was the best part of this app. This update is saddening & I am very disappointed by this. Please bring it back. Thank you.

title: New update is a no-no
review: I never leave reviews, but I’ve been using Marcus app since they forced me to change from Clarity. I’ve thoroughly enjoyed it but this most recent update is a major no no for me. I’ve considered leaving to competitors before but stayed loyal because Marcus has been a good app this whole time. I miss seeing all of the additional information from Insights. Very disappointed in this “simpler” update. I will be starting to look elsewhere.

title: Transactions
review: I can’t no longer see my transactions. Works fine using the website though.

title: Love the service, upset with one recent change.
review:
I wanna preface that I love the service and recommend Marcus to all my people. 

The recent software update seemed to remove the account growth bar graphs.  I don’t really get much benefit from a more sleek design, especially since the design was already intuitive (at least for my purpose) Honestly, the bar graphs/visual representation was the most beneficial feature to my saving journey. 

One of the things that really motivated me while saving was being able to visualize my account value in the bar graph that the app provided. 
Money has always been tight and it has never been easy to save, so I really appreciated having that visual cue to keep me going. Only looking at numbers doesn’t do anything for me. 

Again, I love this service and the app has always been easy and good to use. This alone isn’t enough to make me switch to a competitor and I still plan on utilizing Marcus I just really hope to see this feature return.

title: Transfer out of
review: It’s 5* but I wish there was instant transfers or at least more timely. Like the interest rate

title: New version
review: Hate it, removed the insights (with no notice) and month to month visual graph. Now just looks like every other finance app. Absolutely hate it

title: New App Design Blows
review: Removing the visual chart elements from the app in exchange for a “sleeker streamlined look” is a bad move. The visual charts are part of what made the old app stand out. Making it interactive to grow your money, as you saw the monthly balance go up. Now it looks like any old boring banking app…

title: Waste of update!
review: The new update lost some features that were really good like tracking how much you saved between months. Now I have to look at statements and compare instead of a nice bar chart 📊

title: What happened to all my linked accounts?
review:
Please, revert this update. Bring back the features you’ve removed. I had my different accounts linked to Marcus, and was able to budget my monthly spending in a very convenient way! Rent, groceries, car, bills/utilities, etc. Your team has removed one of the most useful features of this app, and it MUST be reinstated.

Reading these reviews, I am not the only one who requests the old features to return. What makes this app different than any other app?

title: Great App
review: I really like the simple interface, everything is very self-explanatory

title: Bring Back Insights!!!
review: Marcus Insights was the #1 reason I opened the app. Bring it back! No reason to stick with Marcus at this point, better rates at Citbank.

title: New Update Much Worse
review:
They’ve gutted features, made it look worse, replaced the inspirational quotes with some clunky 3D art and are calling it “simpler” and easier to use. Extremely disappointed. 

As an online bank which competes pretty much by app and APY, seeing the app ruined like this makes me want to leave. I’d no longer recommend Marcus.

title: HYSA
review: Best high yields savings account. Easy online use through app. Only disadvantage is that transfers take a little bit (3-5 days), but is well worth the wait. Recommend!

title: Removed features with no warning
review: What happened to the tracking external accounts feature it’s half the reason I even use this app/account? Update: Well it seems that was a very poor decision and something done to reduce cost not enhance the customer experience. Based on other reviews other customers didn’t ask to have their experience “simplified”. I also noticed that all the recent good reviews all say basically the same thing “the app is simple to use.” A regurgitation of what you guys are saying to every bad review. So these are obviously fake reviews to try and counter all the horrible reviews you guys are now getting for this stupid update you made to save a buck.

title: Amazing
review: I already likes the app a lot, one of the best interest rates and easy to use, now with the latest update the interface is way better and even easier to use. 10/10 for me, very recomendable.

title: Reverse transfer
review: I keep trying to transfer my money to my HYSA but keeps getting returning for no reason

title: Budget / Insights Feature Removed
review: Was the best part of the app.
Simple and easy

title: Review
review: I like and it is very good. Tq

title: Insights feature
review: How can you remove the insights feature? It was literary the heart of this app.

title: Lost all features??
review: I opened the app and lost the budgeting feature? Which was one of my favorites to use. No option to get it back. So now this is just a savings account app? Very disappointing in the decision to get rid of it.

title: Ease of use
review: Very easy to maneuver

title: Newest update
review: I love using Marcus because of its simplicity but this latest update cleaned it up a little too much. I miss the graph of the ending balances for the last 12 months. I hope this comes back in the next update.

title: Marcus Account
review: The best. Nothing at all, ever, to complain about!! Very satisfied!

title: Not trustworthy
review: The Insights features were removed unexpectedly, without any prior notice. I have been using Marcus for years. I have important personal financial data stored in the app. Once day I opened the app, everything is gone! No email communication, no way to get my data back, zero care for its customers. This is a very bad move. I won’t trust any Goldman Sachs product in the future.

title: Was great until Marcus Insights was removed
review: I wish I could give this app more than 2 stars but when I opened the app today, it was missing the one feature I used it for. That feature was Marcus Insights. This dashboard was a great way to see where I was spending by showing a pie chart of the different categories. I was disappointed to see that it was taken away. I reached out to support to see where it was but was told it was not a feature Marcus offers. I had to get on Reddit to see what was going on with the app. That was one the main reasons I used the app so it’s unfortunate to have to find another app.

title: Ridiculous update
review: I’ve never written a review, but now is the time. I used to think the Marcus app was one of if not the best financial apps out there. With the latest update, it’s one of the worst. Why would you remove key beloved features with no warning? I had spent quite a bit of time linking to other accounts in order to see my whole financial picture. That is all gone in a flash. My whole financial planning routine is now defunct. Don’t feed us that “in order to simplify organization” spin - it’s insulting! Will quite likely move a substantial amount of money from this account and close it. I’ll also advise others against using your product. You clearly don’t care what your loyal clients think of you.

title: Works
review: All the time, every time.

title: Bad update
review: The pictures they have posted are false. Marcus by Goldman Sachs no longer offers insights ! You can not see a review of any other bank accounts you have attached and it is limited to 4 accounts that can be attached. You can not see a breakdown of your expenses ,deposits , or your overall portfolio. They have reached out to me but have not taken down the all in one banking they advertise. They do not offer all in one banking anymore.

title: June 2024 version
review: Is a sad shell of its former self. Without any graph visualizations and integrated account information, not sure what the benefit of this app is…I guess GS gave up on Marcus account holders…

title: You want too much information
review: I’m not giving you nor anyone else access to my banking information.

title: Pls add a dark mode
review: Title.

title: Love it and watching my $ grow!
review: This app has been great for me! It’s designed really well - super aesthetically pleasing. I’m able to move money around seamlessly. I actually look forward to putting money into the account because I can see it grow over time, and it’s super easy to do! Thanks Goldman Sachs! 😃

title: Marcus insight removed
review: They removed the insight feature witch was one of the reasons why I went opened account. Now that they decided to remove this feature I am highly interested on opening SoFi account and closing my Marcus account. Very disappointing.

title: Where are my external accounts?
review: How to see my linked external accounts? This update removes everything???

title: Insight removal
review: Bring back the Insight for external accounts!

title: Crashes
review: When trying to schedule a future payment app always crashes

title: Only one thing I don’t like about it
review: This money saving app is really good. Helped me save for my trip to Italy and my upcoming one to Mexico next month. The only thing I don’t like about this is the fact when you do a transfer from your bank account to Marcus the transfer can take an entire week or a little more. Wish they worked on that to make the transfers faster. Other than that it’s not bad. If it wasn’t for how long the transfer takes I would’ve gave this app 5 stars but the transfer makes it a 4

title: Tracking gone?
review: Why would you remove tracking? This was like the only feature people cared about. You can pick up 4% yield literally anywhere else. Such a bad decision, made me write my first review ever

title: Does not track anything anymore
review: Doesn’t track anything anymore

title: Marcus account
review: My Marcus account is extremely easy to use. I look forward to my regular interest payments from them and enjoy building wealth with the Goldman Sachs brand.

title: Wonderful experience
review: So easy to use, the best interest paid, quick and simple for transfers, deposits, withdrawals!

title: Used to be good…
review:
They removed the best feature with zero warning. 

You used to be able to track liabilities & all external accounts. That was the only reason I used this app. Wouldn’t recommend getting it.

title: Card Help
review: Robert was great to work with and explaining everything to me. Than you!

title: Not as competitive to Sofi now
review: Removing insights and tracking has me looking at Sofi

title: Marcus Insight is Gone
review: Considering closing out the account now that Insight is gone.

title: I love the app. Reason for 4 star is
review: I love everything about the app and the customer service at Marcus is amazing ! The only thing I wish they bring back is the insight feature which allow you to track and manage spending. It’s not a deal breaker but I was looking forward to the feature. title: Lies
review:
I can tell you now the 5 star reviews are NOT about the app for any GM cardholders. The app worked fine initially and then went bad randomly. Any action I try to do I get a message saying to call a rep so they can help me with it. That includes adding my card to Apple Pay. Or getting my virtual card number. I even tried simply changing my phone number when I got a new number. Did the same on my other 8 credit card apps with NO PROBLEM. Had to spend over an hour talking to their fraud department to change my number cause I didn’t have access to the old one anymore for them to send a code to. They almost didn’t do it too! Got to do better. First impressions are everything. I paid the card off and don’t expect to use it anymore. Update many months later: Nothing at all has changed. App functionality is still NOT functional for anything except viewing balances and making payments. Still get prompts to call customer service for everything else I need to do. And on another note Goldman Sachs is leading the plummet in stocks. Wonder why?

Update: A year later 
Card is still terrible. I don’t use it. I went to put a 3 dollar charge on it just to keep it active and got decline. No balance btw. Full credit available. Call customer service , get transferred to fraud dept where the call wait time is approx half hour. I hung up. Too unprofessional and no customer service resources available to help consumers in reasonable time. I will let this card remain inactive until they decide to close the account. This card is a major disappointment, from 3 years ago. Till now. NO PROGRESS
